page_content: Checklist Earn a C– or higher in each course required for the major At least 30 credits must be earned at UMD Earn a minimum of 120 credits 15 of final 30 credits must be earned at the 300- 400 level 12 upper level major credits must be earned at UMD Earn a cumulative 2.0 GPA in all UMD coursework

metadata.source: data/GFPL Four Year Plan and Checklist.pdf
